Title: User able to login with valid credentials
Preconditions:
- Android 14+ device
- App installed and on login screen
- Valid test account exists
Steps:
1. Tap email field
2. Type 'testuser@example.com'
3. Tap password field
4. Type 'ValidPass123!'
5. Tap 'Login' button
Expected Result:
- Loading indicator appears
- Home screen is displayed
- Welcome message visible with user name

Title: User able to see login form elements
Preconditions:
- Android 14+ device
- App launched fresh
- Login screen visible
Expected Result:
- Email field visible with placeholder text
- Password field visible with placeholder text
- Login button visible and enabled
- 'Forgot password' link visible

Title: User not able to login with empty email
Preconditions:
- Android 14+ device
- App on login screen
Steps:
1. Leave email field empty
2. Tap password field
3. Type 'ValidPass123!'
4. Tap 'Login' button
Expected Result:
- Inline error message visible below email field
- Login button remains on screen (no navigation)
- Error message text: 'Email is required'

Title: User not able to login with invalid email format
Preconditions:
- Android 14+ device
- App on login screen
Steps:
1. Tap email field
2. Type 'invalid-email'
3. Tap password field
4. Type 'ValidPass123!'
5. Tap 'Login' button
Expected Result:
- Inline error message visible: 'Invalid email format'
- User remains on login screen

Title: User not able to login with wrong password
Preconditions:
- Android 14+ device
- App on login screen
- Valid email exists in system
Steps:
1. Tap email field
2. Type 'testuser@example.com'
3. Tap password field
4. Type 'WrongPass999!'
5. Tap 'Login' button
Expected Result:
- Error toast/snackbar visible: 'Invalid credentials'
- User remains on login screen
- Password field cleared

Title: User able to toggle password visibility
Preconditions:
- Android 14+ device
- App on login screen
Steps:
1. Tap password field
2. Type 'MySecret123'
3. Tap password visibility toggle icon
Expected Result:
- Password text becomes visible (not masked)
- Toggle icon changes to 'hide' variant

Title: User able to navigate to forgot password screen
Preconditions:
- Android 14+ device
- App on login screen
Expected Result:
- Forgot password screen is displayed
- Email input field visible
- Back navigation available
